title: [release-1.41] CI config: post-branch update
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Tell Cirrus to compare PRs on this branch to the "release-1.41" branch rather than "main".

#### How to verify it

n/a

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: I investigated the CI failures in this PR and compared them to https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6672. The `github.com/opencontainers/cgroups` dependency should be bumped to `v0.0.6` in both branches to resolve this.

> I investigated the CI failures in this PR and compared them to #6672. The `github.com/opencontainers/cgroups` dependency should be bumped to `v0.0.6` in both branches to resolve this.

I don't think that does anything because the error is in runc not our code, see https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/6205
